actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: This is the last gate. Expect fortress-grade resistance.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: If the archive core is intact, bring back whatever it stored.

ARCHIVE CORE
Directive mismatch detected.
Containment protocol revoked by local command authority.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Fortress cleared. The signal is still active somewhere below you.
